description_long: This object is a visually striking electric guitar with a unique, steampunk-inspired design. The body is crafted from a dark, metallic material and features exposed gears, cogs, and mechanical elements integrated into its surface, giving it an industrial aesthetic. The neck is long and slender, with metallic frets and inlays, and the headstock is adorned with multiple tuning pegs and additional gear motifs. The bridge and pickups are also metallic, with intricate detailing and a robust, engineered appearance. The overall color palette is dominated by bronze, gold, and dark brown tones, with a glossy finish that reflects light. This guitar would stand out in any urban setting, especially in environments that celebrate alternative or industrial art styles.
description: A steampunk-inspired electric guitar with a dark metallic body, exposed gears, and intricate mechanical detailing in bronze and gold tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's elongated neck and the thickness of the body, highlighting the metallic sheen and gear details.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full face of the guitar, including the gear-laden body, metallic bridge, and detailed headstock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the back contour of the body and the continuation of the metallic and gear motifs.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the arrangement of gears on the headstock and the overall mechanical complexity of the design.
attribute_headstock_design: Mechanical-themed headstock with multiple tuning pegs and exposed gear motifs, no visible logo.
